steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"price = 34.15
shares_out = 1249258717
equity = 29887586000.0
assets = 116412091000.0
current_assets = 28527346000.0
cash = 3306364000.0

# debt components (from December 2024 data, in BRL)
curr_loans = 5509252000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - Passivo Circulante
+ noncurr_loans = 46226340000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - Passivo Não Circulante
+ debentures = 13714760000.0  # Captação de Debêntures
+ fornecedores = 4628036000.0  # Fornecedores
+ outras_obr = 9974444000.0  # Outras Obrigações
+ provisoes = 4691872000.0  # Provisões
+
# fix: these sums assume BRL values
DIBRUTA = curr_loans + noncurr_loans + debentures + fornecedores + outras_obr + provisoes

market_cap = price * shares_out
net_debt = DIBRUTA - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt

EBIT = 8636463000.0  # 12m EBIT as per 3.05 ÚLTIMO
DAndA = 2185353000.0  # Depreciation & Amortization (ÚLTIMO 2024)
EBITDA = EBIT + DAndA

Revenue = 45366675000.0
GrossProfit = 13056962000.0
# margins
marg_bruta = GrossProfit / Revenue * 100
marg_ebit = EBIT / Revenue * 100
marg_liquida = 3767805000.0 / Revenue * 100

EPS = 2811675000.0 / shares_out  # LPA
LPA = EPS
VPA = equity / shares_out
P_L = price / LPA
P_VP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / shares_out)
PSR = price / (Revenue / shares_out)
P_Ativos = price / (assets / shares_out)
working_capital = (current_assets - 19605209000.0)  # current assets minus current liabilities? Not exactly: use Net working capital = CA - CL
# Compute current liabilities: Passivo Circulante
current_liabilities = 19605209000.0
net_wc = current_assets - current_liabilities
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (net_wc / shares_out)
Giro_Ativos = Revenue / assets
ROE = 3767805000.0 / (29887586000.0)
ROIC = EBIT / (assets - 0)  # simplified: EBIT / (Total Assets - (Equity? use formula in prompt: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa))
ROIC = EBIT / (assets - fornecedores - cash)
DIV_BR_PAT = (DIBRUTA) / equity
Giro_ativos = Revenue / assets

print("market_cap", market_cap)
print("EV", EV)
print("net_debt", net_debt)
print("EBITDA", EBITDA)
print("P/L", P_L)
print("P/VP", P_VP)
print("P/EBIT", P_EBIT)
print("PSR", PSR)
print("P/Ativos", P_Ativos)
print("P/Cap.Giro", price / (net_wc / shares_out))
print("Giro Ativos", Giro_ativos)
print("LPA", LPA)
print("VPA", VPA)
print("Marg Bruta", marg_bruta)
print("Marg EBIT", marg_ebit)
print("Marg Liquida", marg_liquida)
print("ROIC", ROIC)
print("ROE", ROE)
print("Div Br/ Patrim", DIV_BR_PAT)
"} }

equity = 29887586000.0
assets = 116412091000.0
current_assets = 28527346000.0
cash = 3306364000.0

# debt components (from December 2024 data, in BRL)
curr_loans = 5509252000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - Passivo Circulante
noncurr_loans = 46226340000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - Passivo Não Circulante
debentures = 13714760000.0  # Captação de Debêntures
fornecedores = 4628036000.0  # Fornecedores
outras_obr = 9974444000.0  # Outras Obrigações
provisoes = 4691872000.0  # Provisões

DIBRUTA = curr_loans + noncurr_loans + debentures + fornecedores + outras_obr + provisoes

market_cap = price * shares_out
net_debt = DIBRUTA - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt

EBIT = 8636463000.0  # 12m EBIT as per 3.05 ÚLTIMO
DAndA = 2185353000.0  # Depreciation & Amortization (ÚLTIMO 2024)
EBITDA = EBIT + DAndA

Revenue = 45366675000.0
GrossProfit = 13056962000.0
# margins
marg_bruta = GrossProfit / Revenue * 100
marg_ebit = EBIT / Revenue * 100
marg_liquida = 3767805000.0 / Revenue * 100

EPS = 2811675000.0 / shares_out  # LPA
LPA = EPS
VPA = equity / shares_out
P_L = price / LPA
P_VP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / shares_out)
PSR = price / (Revenue / shares_out)
P_Ativos = price / (assets / shares_out)
current_liabilities = 19605209000.0
net_wc = current_assets - current_liabilities
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (net_wc / shares_out)
Giro_Ativos = Revenue / assets
ROE = 3767805000.0 / (Equity if (Equity := equity) else 1)  # placeholder
ROIC = EBIT / (assets - fornecedores - cash)
DIV_BR_PAT = DIBRUTA / equity

print("market_cap", market_cap)
print("EV", EV)
print("net_debt", net_debt)
print("EBITDA", EBITDA)
print("P/L", P_L)
print("P/VP", P_VP)
print("P/EBIT", P_EBIT)
print("PSR", PSR)
print("P/Ativos", P_Ativos)
print("P/Ativ Circ Liq", P_AtivCircLiq)
print("Giro Ativos", Giro_Ativos)
print("LPA", LPA)
print("VPA", VPA)
print("Marg Bruta", marg_bruta)
print("Marg EBIT", marg_ebit)
print("Marg Liquida", MargLiquida := marg_liquida)
print("ROIC", ROIC)
print("ROE", ROE)
print("Div Br/ Patrim", DIV_BR_PAT)
"} }
